COSMOS trial — landmark RCT with 21,442 participants over 3.6 years; 27% reduction in CVD mortality with cocoa flavanol supplementation (500 mg/day); published in Am J Clin Nutr 2022
2025 systematic review of cocoa flavanols and peripheral/cerebral microvascular function across multiple RCTs; confirms consistent vasodilatory and endothelial benefits
Systematic review and meta-analysis of RCTs on cocoa flavanol intake and cardiometabolic biomarkers; confirms improvements in insulin sensitivity, blood pressure, and lipid markers

Aging-US 2025 — theobromine blood levels associated with slower epigenetic aging (DNA methylation) and longer telomeres in 2 European cohorts (n=1669); observational not RCT; DOI 10.18632/aging.206344
COSMOS sub-analysis in Hypertension 2025 — cocoa extract did not reduce overall hypertension incidence but showed 30% reduced risk in participants with normal baseline BP; adds nuance to BP claims

Nature Neuroscience 2014 RCT (Columbia University); 50-69yr adults; high-flavanol diet 3 months improved dentate gyrus function and memory; memory resembled decades-younger participants; first causal evidence for flavanol reversal of hippocampal memory decline
